_readme: Maps toolkit operations to external tool commands, catalogs known plugins, and tracks MCP servers. Update here when GSD or Superpowers change.

vercel.description: Vercel ecosystem guidance — Next.js, AI SDK, deployment, storage. ~52K tokens overhead per session.

superpowers.description: Development methodology — TDD, code review, git worktrees, debugging, planning.

impeccable.description: UI/UX design quality — critique, polish, audit, animate, normalize.

mcp_servers._readme: Catalogs MCP servers with per-project relevance. Session-start hook checks alignment like plugins. Servers not needed for a project waste tokens on tool schema registration.

context7.description: Documentation lookups via Context7. Used by all projects for version-aware doc queries.

surrealdb.description: SurrealDB MCP — live queries, schema ops, namespace management. Only needed for SurrealDB projects.

lenses._readme: Specialist review lenses dispatched during phase-closeout Phase 2. Each lens restricts scope to one concern. The base code_review still runs for general quality. Add new lenses here as evidence justifies them.

schema.prompt: Compare every db.query(), db.create(), db.update(), and db.select() call against the SCHEMAFULL table definitions. Flag: missing required fields, extra undefined fields, wrong field types, use of type::thing() (v2 only), missing ASSERT constraints. Ignore files outside the diff range.

security.prompt: Check for: SQL/SurrealQL injection via string concatenation, XSS in rendered output, missing auth checks on API routes, hardcoded secrets, insecure direct object references. Only review files in the diff range.

execute_phase.description: Execute all plans in a phase

quick_task.description: Execute a quick task with GSD guarantees

code_review.description: Run code review on completed work

git_worktree.description: Create isolated git worktree for feature work

finish_branch.description: Complete and merge a development branch

new_project.description: Start a new project from scratch
